title: Motion Search
description: Draw a polygon to define the region of interest, and specify a time range to search for motion changes within that region.
noResultsYet: Run a search to find motion changes in the selected region
noChangesFound: No pixel changes detected in the selected region

settings.title: Search Settings
settings.parallelModeDesc: Scan multiple recording segments at the same time (faster, but significantly more CPU intensive)
settings.minAreaDesc: Minimum percentage of the region of interest that must change to be considered significant
settings.frameSkipDesc: Process every Nth frame. Set this to your camera's frame rate to process one frame per second (e.g. 5 for a 5 FPS camera, 30 for a 30 FPS camera). Higher values will be faster, but may miss short motion events.
settings.maxResultsDesc: Stop after this many matching timestamps

errors.noROI: Please draw a region of interest
errors.invalidTimeRange: End time must be after start time
errors.polygonTooSmall: Polygon must have at least 3 points
